config.title:
Kasa fiskalna
#ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'messagebox #include "50122"
dim g_pM60224 : set g_pM60224 = nothing dim g_pSettings : set g_pSettings = nothing
function fopen() : fopen = true set g_pM60224 = doc_.getmodule(60224) set g_pSettings = g_pM60224.new_fiskkas_settings() g_pSettings.from_registry "HKLM_KASA_TYPE_MODE_SETTINGS"
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FISKAS_MODEL).value = g_pSettings.m_nModel ' page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ONLINE).value = g_pSettings.m_cOnline end function
function fok g_pSettings.m_nModel = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FISKAS_MODEL).value ' g_pSettings.m_cOnline = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ONLINE).value
g_pSettings.to_registry "HKLM_KASA_TYPE_MODE_SETTINGS" page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
function comm_settings
dim pNewHli set pNewHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_FORM_COMM_PORT_SETTINGS")
dim pPage:set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pNewHli) if pPage is nothing then exit function end if
pPage.setup "Konfiguracja portu kasy fiskalnej" , "HKLM_KASA_SETTINGS"
pPage.domodalauto
set pPage=nothing
end function
function OnTestConnection dim pTestTransfer : set pTestTransfer = g_pM60224.new_CashReq_Optimus_Tango_Transfer() if pTestTransfer.test_connection() then MessageBox "Test wypadł pomyślnie", "Test połączenia", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else MessageBox pTestTransfer.get_last_error(), "Test połączenia", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if end function
function send_plu
dim pCursor
dim dialog_produkt_filtr : set dialog_produkt_filtr = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_WIZARD_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_PRODUKT_FILTR") dim nRes:nRes = dialog_produkt_filtr.domodalauto() if nRes <> 0 then set pCursor = dialog_produkt_filtr.cursor_for_send_to_kasa() if pCursor is nothing then exit function end if dim pM60224 : set pM60224 = doc_.getmodule(60224) pM60224.send_products_to_kasa pCursor end if
end function

page.body:
Model
Optimus IC Tango i zgodne
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,20,Konfiguracja portu,varFunction=comm_settings) QXE_BUTTON(-1,20,Test połączenia,varFunction=OnTestConnection)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,20,Programowanie PLU,varFunction=send_plu)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
